_comment: PERF-06 committed per-route JS budget (gzipped, kB). Generated by `pnpm build && pnpm check:bundle-budget` — routes are directories under .next/server/app matching a page_client-reference-manifest.js. Ceilings are baseline + ~15% headroom. Bump a ceiling only with a deliberate reason (new dependency, new client tree); CI fails if a route silently grows past it.

baseline.note: Re-baselined after PERF-06 lucide-react wildcard→named-import fix (categoryIcons.ts): shipped ~160kB of unused icons to every page; each route dropped ~153kB. Previous baseline (2026-07-06): /=401.2, /ad/[id]=411.4, /search=419.2.
